The Proposal: -
Reference No. For the development of farmers in case of farmer suicides in the state under sections 1 and 2, and
Various measures have been incorporated for welfare. Suicide by farmers
The families were being given assistance from the Chief Minister's Relief Fund as per the prescribed criteria. It's now
Assistance - Funds required from the regular budget under the head Social Security and Welfare
are being provided. The decision to provide assistance to the heirs will be taken under the chairmanship of the Collector.
Based on the reports received from the District Level Committee Tehsildar and Taluk Level Officers
The aid is being approved.
Government Decision on Reference 3. The Committee constituted in accordance with the 09.04.2025 said:
Immediate help to the family of farmers who have committed suicide by reducing the delay in the process
For this purpose, the district level committee was reconstituted and the taluk level committee was formed on the same lines.
It is recommended to do. Unsatisfied with these recommendations, the district-level committee on farmer suicides
Changes to the structure were under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
To be constituted for the development and welfare of families of farmers who have committed suicide.
The composition of the district-level committee for farmer suicides has been partially changed to district-level committee.
Surgeons, District Sub-Registrars Cooperative Societies, Managers District Agrani Bank
Recommendation to be made Reference No. According to 3, the study committee constituted by the decision of the government
With the acceptance of such a recommendation, the composition of the Farmers Suicide District Level Committee is now
It will be as follows: -
Farmers Suicide District Level Committee
On the lines of the said District Level Committee, the composition of the Taluk Level Committee shall be as follows.
Farmers Suicide Taluk Level Committee
The District Collector reports by constituting District Level and Taluk Level Committees as aforesaid.
be submitted. The committee disposed of the cases in its jurisdiction immediately and submitted a report to the government.
Do it.
